curtain_window_open.name: Curtains (Open)

lamp_table_wide.name: Table Lamp (Wide Shade)

lamp_table_slim.name: Table Lamp (Slim Shade)
lamp_table_slim.description: A gold table lamp with a slim, bell-shaped lampshade on a slender dark base.

bed_double_ornate.name: Double Bed (Ornate)
bed_double_ornate.description: A luxurious double bed viewed from above, with two gold pillows at the headboard and an ornate mandala-patterned coverlet with fringe.

bed_single_white.name: Single Bed (White)
bed_single_white.description: A simple single bed viewed from above with white linen and a single pillow at the headboard.

bunk_bed.name: Bunk Bed
bunk_bed.description: A two-tier bunk bed with a wooden ladder, both bunks made up with gold coverlets.

bunk_bed_dark_wood.name: Bunk Bed
bunk_bed_dark_wood.description: A sturdy dark wood bunk bed with ladder, sleeping two in stacked bunks.

rug_gold_fringed.name: Rug (Gold, Fringed)

bed_double_gold.name: Double Bed (Gold)
bed_double_gold.description: A wide double bed viewed from above, with blue-white pillows at the headboard and a gold coverlet with fringe at the foot.

bed_single_gold.name: Single Bed (Gold)

bed_single_grey.name: Single Bed (Grey)
